description_long: This object consists of two closed hardcover books lying on a flat surface, partially overlapping each other. The covers are a muted, dark blue-gray color with visible wear and subtle surface texture, suggesting age or frequent use. The top book displays gold embossed text on its front cover, while the bottom book is mostly obscured. The books have a rectangular shape with slightly rounded corners and visible page edges along the sides. The spines are not clearly visible, but the thickness and construction indicate they are standard hardbound volumes. There are no visible illustrations or decorative elements on the covers aside from the text.
description: Two worn, dark blue-gray hardcover books with gold embossed text on the front cover, stacked and partially overlapping.
description_view_0: The top view shows both books overlapping, with the gold text on the upper book clearly visible and the covers' worn texture apparent.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the thickness of the books and the visible page edges, with the covers' color and texture still apparent.
description_view_2: From this perspective, the books' rectangular shape and the layering of one atop the other are emphasized, with less detail visible on the covers.
description_view_3: This view provides a clear look at the gold text on the top book's cover and the way the books are stacked, with the lower book mostly hidden.
